---
title: " "
pagetitle: "Ya-Feng (Jay) Wen"
---
<link rel="stylesheet" href="academicons-1.9.1/css/academicons.min.css"/>


<img src="images/yafengwen_github_round.png" alt="jaywen_headshot" style="width:25%; margin-right: 20px; margin-top: 5px" align="left">

I am an PhD Candidate at the University of Minnesota in the Department of Experimental and Clinical Pharmacology, College of Pharmacy. I am also a licensed Pharmacist in Minnesota.

My research interests are in pharmacotherapy, pharmacogenomics, and pharmacometrics., with applications to cardiovascular diseases.

I earned my Doctoral of Pharmacy in 2017 from the University of Minnesota-Duluth.
